creator: jimmiejaz@gmail.com
text:
Work around would be re-run make config and deselect IMAGEMAGICK_TESTS .

I filed a PR a few days ago, 
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=165535 and CC'd the maintainer.
